description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and package. In the test stage add a test job that uses the clojure:latest Docker image, runs `lein less once` then `lein cljsbuild once`, and is excluded from pipelines, master, and dev branches. In the package stage add a bsd job that runs only on the master and dev refs (excluding pipelines), is tagged with erlang-19 and freebsd-11.0, executes export commands to set SUFFIX, OS_VER, ARCH and BRANCH, runs `gmake dist`, uploads the resulting `rel/pkgng/*.txz` files to an S3 bucket path `s3://freebsd.project-fifo.net/$BRANCH/$ARCH/$OS_VER/`, and finally triggers another GitLab pipeline via a curl POST with the job token and variables ARCH, OS_VER, and BRANCH. Also in the package stage add a smartos job that runs only on master and dev (excluding pipelines), is tagged with erlang-19 and smartos, sets SUFFIX, DS_VER and BRANCH via export commands, runs `gmake dist`, creates `rel/pkg/info`, uploads `rel/pkg/*.tgz` to `s3://release.project-fifo.net/pkg/$DS_VER/$BRANCH/`, extracts package info with `pkg_info -X` and uploads it to `s3://release-info.project-fifo.net/pkg/$DS_VER/$BRANCH/`, then triggers a downstream pipeline with a curl POST containing the job token and variables DS_VER and BRANCH.
